title: F1 2026 Boat
description: This is a F1 2026 Boat Resource Pack by AdamixGaming, Jerpix and NotGatoz
body:
**Not affiliated with any official racing series.**



**Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (recommended), or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), to support custom models and textures.**



_If you want to appreciate our work, you will find links to our buycoffees in the "License" file in the texturepack._

****

**Mercedes Safety Car**

_All boat with chest (without bamboo chest raft)_

****

**Aston Martin Safety Car**

_Bamboo Chest Raft_
